meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Pitching to Solve Debugging Bottlenecks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn to pitch debugging services to clients using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and earn more.
content.answer_block: Stop treating debugging as a failure and start selling it as a premium audit service. By leveraging AI-driven CLI tools like Claude Code and Antigravity, you can resolve complex architectural debt in minutes. Position yourself as an efficiency expert who transforms broken, unscalable codebases into high-performance, stable production assets.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. You’ve been staring at a stack trace for three hours, and the client is breathing down your neck for a deployment that should have gone live yesterday. The anxiety of 'can't debug code' is the silent killer of freelance careers, turning high-ticket projects into endless, unbillable maintenance cycles.

But what if that friction was actually your greatest asset? Instead of hiding your struggle, you can pivot your freelance business toward 'Code Recovery' services. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity and Claude Code, you don't just fix bugs—you become the architect who saves failing projects, charging a premium for the speed and precision that AI brings to your workflow.

steps.title: Analyze the Technical Debt
steps.description: Before pitching, diagnose the root cause of the bugs to define the project scope clearly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for architectural bottlenecks and common failure points. Identify the top 3 critical bugs causing system instability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project structure and identify 3 critical bugs'

steps.title: Draft the 'Recovery' Pitch
steps.description: Frame the debugging service as a 'Technical Audit and Performance Recovery' package.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional email pitch to a client explaining that their system instability requires a structural audit, not just a patch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Draft a project recovery proposal focusing on stability ROI'

steps.title: Execute Automated Diagnostics
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution path and isolate the problematic logic in the client's repo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a step-by-step debugging plan for this specific trace error: [insert trace].
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'trace error and suggest a fix for this specific function'

steps.title: Refactor for Stability
steps.description: Implement robust error handling to ensure the codebase remains maintainable after the fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this legacy code to use modern error handling patterns and improve testability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor code for better error handling and unit test coverage'

steps.title: Deliver the 'Health' Report
steps.description: Provide the client with a post-fix report that justifies your billable hours and demonstrates value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise summary of the fixes applied and a list of recommendations for future system stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a summary report of all changes and system improvements'

pro_tips: Never bill for 'debugging'; bill for 'System Optimization and Recovery' to justify higher hourly rates.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for every bug you fix to prevent regression and lock in your value.
Keep a 'Fix Log' generated by AI to show clients exactly how much work was involved in solving 'unsolvable' issues.
If a bug is recurring, pitch an automated monitoring setup as an upsell, not just a one-time fix.
Always run your AI-suggested fixes in a separate branch and document the 'before vs after' performance metrics.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully recovered your first project, create a case study highlighting the 'Before and After' performance metrics to attract higher-tier clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start leading your projects with professional-grade AI tools. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
